output.level_rationale: Title "Business Operations and Growth Lead" in a mature, US-headquartered tech company typically signals L4–L5 IC or early manager scope. No years required, reporting line, or team-management language in provided JD text. Sydney location and 'Lead' suffix suggest possible individual contributor or small-team ownership. Without full JD body, confidence is low.
output.summary: The provided JD snapshot contains only boilerplate page markup and metadata; the actual job description, responsibilities, reporting structure, and key requirements are not present. Role title and location suggest a Strategy & Operations or Business Operations position at Airbnb, which aligns with candidate's primary families, but lack of substantive JD content prevents meaningful assessment of scope seniority, growth focus, or specific skill gaps. Cannot recommend without complete role details.
